zh.Powis Castle, Montgomeryshire, Wales: 威爾士蒙格莫利夏爾波維斯 卡素
zh.Warmingham, Cheshire, England: 英國英格蘭爾瓦明加姆
zh.lifeSummary: 當Catherine Herbert於1580年出生在英國威爾斯波斯時，她的父親Sir Edward Herbert36歲，母親Mary Stanley22歲。她於大約1608年與Sir William Massey of Puddington在威爾士蒙格莫利夏爾結婚。他們至少是8個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於1625年在英國爾伯頓享年45歲。

zh-hans.Powis Castle, Montgomeryshire, Wales: 威尔士蒙格莫利夏爾波維斯 卡素
zh-hans.Warmingham, Cheshire, England: 英国英格兰爾瓦明加姆
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Catherine Herbert于1580年出生在英国威尔斯波斯时，她的父亲Sir Edward Herbert36岁，母亲Mary Stanley22岁。她于大约1608年与Sir William Massey of Puddington在威尔士蒙格莫利夏爾结婚。他们至少是8个儿子和4个女儿的父母。她去世于1625年在英国爾伯頓享年45岁。

nameMeanings.name: Herbert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German, English, and French: from a personal name composed of the ancient Germanic elements heri, hari ‘army’ + berht ‘bright, famous’. In Britain, this Old French name, introduced by the Normans, reinforced the less common Old English cognate Herebeorht. The surname was taken to Ireland after the Anglo-Norman invasion and in the 16th century.
Jewish (Ashkenazic): from the German personal name (see 1 above).

variants.name: Harbison
meanings: Scottish (Glasgow): patronymic from the Older Scots and Middle English personal name Herbert (the change from -er- to -ar- was a common one in Old French and Middle English). An intrusive n later gave Harbinson .

variants.name: Hebard
meanings: English (Surrey):
variant of Herbert , with assimilation of the first r. Compare Hebb .
variant of   Hibbert  .

variants.name: Harbert
meanings: German and English: variant of   Herbert  .

variants.name: Herbers
meanings: German and Dutch: patronymic from   Herbert  . It is found mainly in Lower Saxony and across the Dutch border.

variants.name: Dickherber
meanings: Probably a nickname for a fat person by the name of Herbert , of which Herber is a short form, or, more likely, in the north from Die(c)kherber, a topographic and distinguishing name for a Herber living by the dike, see Dicke 2. Compare Dickmeyer .

variants.name: Hebert
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Armand, Andre, Emile, Normand, Jacques, Marcel, Pierre, Lucien, Michel, Gaston, Alcide, Camille.
French (Hébert): assimilated form of Herbert . Compare Abair , Abar , Abare , Abear , Aber , Eber , and Ebert .
German: variant of   Heber   1.

variants.name: Herber
meanings: German and Dutch: variant of   Herbert  .

variants.name: Herbertson
meanings: Scottish (Glasgow): patronymic from the Older Scots and Middle English personal name   Herbert  .

variants.name: Hebb
meanings: English (East Yorkshire and northeast Midlands): from the Middle English personal name Hebb, Ebb, pet forms of Herbert .

variants.name: Herb
meanings: South German: nickname for a harsh or rough person, from Middle High German herb ‘tart, harsh’.
German: from the personal name Herpo, a pet form of Herbert .

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."

en.lifeSummary: When Catherine Herbert was born in 1580, in Powys, Wales, United Kingdom, her father, Sir Edward Herbert, was 36 and her mother, Mary Stanley, was 22. She married Sir William Massey of Puddington about 1608, in Montgomeryshire, Wales. They were the parents of at least 8 sons and 4 daughters. She died in 1625, in Burton, Cheshire, England, at the age of 45.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Catherine Herbert est née en 1580, à Powys, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir Edward Herbert, avait 36 ans et sa mère, Mary Stanley, avait 22 ans. Elle a épousé Sir William Massey of Puddington environ 1608, à Montgomeryshire, Galles. Ils ont eu au moins 8 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée en 1625, à Burton, Cheshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 45 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Catherine Herbert 1580 in Powys, Wales, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Edward Herbert 36 und ihre Mutter Mary Stanley 22. Sie hat um 1608 in Montgomeryshire, Wales Sir William Massey of Puddington geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 8 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Sie starb 1625 im Alter von 45 Jahren in Burton, Cheshire, England.

ht.Powys, Wales: Powys, Pays de Galles, United Kingdom

it.lifeSummary: Quando Catherine Herbert è nata il nel 1580 nel Powys, Galles, Regno Unito, sua padre, Sir Edward Herbert, aveva 36 anni e sua madre, Mary Stanley, aveva 22 anni. Lei sposato Sir William Massey of Puddington circa 1608, nel Montgomeryshire, Galles. Erano genitori di almeno 8 figli e 4 figlie. Morì nel 1625, nel Burton, Cheshire, England, all'età di 45 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Catherine Herbertが1580年にイギリスウェールズポウイスで生まれた時，父Sir Edward Herbertは36歳，母Mary Stanleyは22歳であった。約1608年にウェールズモントゴメリシュアイアでSir William Massey of Puddingtonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも8人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼女は1625年にイギリスチェシュアイアブルトンで45歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Catherine Herbert(이)가 1580년 영국 웨일스 파우이스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Edward Herbert(은)는 36세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Mary Stanley(은)는 22세였다. 그녀는 대략 1608년 웨일스 몽고머이실르에서 Sir William Massey of Puddington(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여덟 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1625년 영국 체실르 버턴에서 45세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Catherine Herbert nasceu em 1580, em Powys, Gales, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir Edward Herbert, tinha 36 anos e sua mãe, Mary Stanley, tinha 22 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir William Massey of Puddington aproximadamente 1608, em Montgomeryshire, Gales. Eles tiveram pelo menos 8 filhos e 4 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1625, em Burton, Cheshire, Inglaterra, com 45 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Catherine Herbert родилась в 1580 г. в местности поуис, Уэльс, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Sir Edward Herbert было 36 лет, а матери, которую звали Mary Stanley, 22. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir William Massey of Puddington около 1608 г. в местности монтгомиришир, Уэльс. У них было по крайней мере 8 сыновей и 4 дочери. Она умерла в 1625 г. в местности буртон, чешир, Англия в возрасте 45 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Catherine Herbert nació en 1580, en Powys, Gales, Reino Unido, su papá, Sir Edward Herbert, tenía 36 años y su mamá, Mary Stanley, tenía 22 años. Se casó con Sir William Massey of Puddington aproximadamente 1608, en Montgomeryshire, Gales. Fueron padres de por lo menos 8 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió en 1625, en Burton, Cheshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 45 años.
